items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning — Chapter 2.5 (Local Methods in High Dimensions)
items.author: Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani, Jerome Friedman
items.note: Canonical ML treatment of curse of dimensionality, k-NN failure modes, and bias–variance in high d.

items.title: Adaptive Control Processes (Bellman, 1961)
items.author: Richard Bellman
items.note: Original coinage of 'curse of dimensionality' in dynamic programming and grid-based state spaces.

items.title: On the Surprising Behavior of Distance Metrics in High Dimensional Space (Aggarwal et al.)
items.author: Charu C. Aggarwal, Alexander Hinneburg, Daniel A. Keim
items.note: Empirical distance concentration and implications for nearest-neighbor search.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning — Section 1.4 (The Curse of Dimensionality)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Pedagogical introduction tying volume, polynomial fitting, and smoothness to dimension.
